hero.headline: Your pet’s identity, always with you.
hero.subhead: Register the microchip, certify, and declare lost. A network for owners and clinics in Peru.

hub.title: Explore AlmaPet ID
hub.subtitle: Each section is its own view. Pick where to start.

why.title: Why it matters
why.body: Abandonment, unregistered chips, and responsible ownership in Peru.

how.title: How it works
how.body: Register, certify, recover — plus microchip benefits.

vets.title: Veterinarians
vets.body: How your clinic becomes a registering entity on the network.

audiences.title: Owners & clinics
audiences.body: Two clear paths to join AlmaPet ID.

lost.title: Lost pets
lost.body: Public reunion wall without sensitive home details.

search.title: Search microchip
search.body: Look up by microchip number or AlmaPet public code.

pricing.title: Pricing & plans
pricing.body: Service registry fee: certificate, profile, and reunion network.

why.title: Why identification matters
why.subtitle: ID only works if a network connects owner, clinic, and finder.

how.title: How AlmaPet ID works
how.subtitle: From microchip to certificate and reunion, step by step.

vets.title: Veterinarians on the network
vets.subtitle: Implant, register, and manage lost pets from your clinic — no crypto.

audiences.title: Owners and clinics
audiences.subtitle: One animal identity network, two experiences built for you.

magnet.title: Hire AlmaPet ID registration for your pet
magnet.subtitle: You pay the digital service fee: network identity, certificate, and lost declaration. Your vet places the physical chip.

a.title: Registration with certificate
a.body: ISO microchip enrollment + public AlmaPet code on the network.

b.title: Lost when needed
b.body: Declare lost and activate the public profile for reunion.

c.title: No crypto
c.body: Pay the fee in local currency. No wallets or blockchain.

pricing.title: AlmaPet ID service plans
pricing.subtitle: This is the network registry fee (digital service contract). It does not include the physical chip or clinic implant.
pricing.fallback_desc: Registration on the AlmaPet ID network.
pricing.note: Prices in PEN. Pay in-app when registering your pet. The physical chip is handled by your clinic.

search_page.title: Search microchip
search_page.subtitle: Look up by microchip number, AlmaPet code, or certificate. No sensitive home details.
search_page.hint: E.g. 15-digit ISO, short QR code, or AP-… certificate.
search_page.invalid: Enter at least 4 characters (microchip or AlmaPet code).
search_page.not_found_body: We couldn’t find “{{q}}” on the AlmaPet ID network.
search_page.not_found_edu: An implanted chip without registration won’t help with reunion. Register the chip to activate network identity.

float.whatsapp_message: Hi AlmaPet ID, I’d like information about microchip registration.
float.whatsapp_clinic_message: Hi AlmaPet ID, I’m a clinic/vet and want to join the network.

causes.title: Identification is also protection
causes.subtitle: Many countries already support pet ID as part of responsible ownership. In practice, a chip only works if a network connects it to the owner and clinic — without crypto friction.
causes.closing: With your registration and your clinic’s, we can change how families reunite with their animals.

abandonment.title: Abandonment
abandonment.body: Without linked identity, a found animal becomes a “stray”. Registration helps bring them home.

lost.title: Lost pets
lost.body: Declaring lost on AlmaPet activates the public profile so finders can report without seeing your phone.

unregistered.title: Chip without registry
unregistered.body: Implanting without registering leaves a dead number. Clinics can close that gap in one click.

abuse.title: Abuse & irresponsibility
abuse.body: Formal ID reinforces responsible ownership and supports recovery with authorities when needed.

trafficking.title: Irregular trade
trafficking.body: Ownership history and a certificate make companion-animal trafficking harder.

law.title: Peru’s legal frame
law.body: Companion-animal identification aligns with responsible ownership and municipal / RENIAN-style registries.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: The microchip identifies. AlmaPet ID connects owner, clinic, and finder.

register.title: Register
register.body: The clinic or owner enrolls the ISO microchip on the AlmaPet ID network.

certify.title: Certify
certify.body: You get a public code and a digital profile to share or put on a collar tag.

recover.title: Recover
recover.body: If they’re lost, declare it. Finders can report without seeing your phone number.

benefits.title: What you gain by registering
benefits.subtitle: The chip is rice-grain sized. The value is the network: identity, reunion, and day-to-day clinic operations.
benefits.image_alt: Microchip procedure at a veterinary clinic
benefits.caption: ISO microchip: identifies. AlmaPet ID: connects.

identity.title: Permanent identity
identity.body: A unique code linked to your pet and you as verified tutor.

reunion.title: Better reunion odds
reunion.body: Visible lost status, public wall, and mediated found reports.

travel.title: Travel-ready baseline
travel.body: ISO microchips are common for international paperwork; registration keeps your data tidy.

clinic.title: Clinic at the center
clinic.body: Whoever implants can register on the spot — fewer loose papers, better follow-up.

law.title: Responsible ownership
law.body: Aligns with formal identification and a digital certificate / card.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.body: The public profile does not expose national ID or exact home address.

vets.title: Veterinarians and clinics on the network
vets.subtitle: These are the institutions that implant the microchip and upload the record to AlmaPet ID under national rules. No wallets or blockchain — real clinical operations.
vets.image_alt: Veterinarian caring for a dog in clinic
vets.contact_title: Are you a clinic or vet?
vets.contact_body: Message us on WhatsApp at {{phone}} to join as a registering entity.

entity.title: Be a registering entity
entity.body: A clinic, practice, or organization authorized to identify companion animals.

network.title: Join the AlmaPet network
network.body: Create the clinic account, verify your details, and start registering chips.

ready.title: Operate from day one
ready.body: Patient enrollment, lost declarations, and a registrations panel in one place.

owner.title: I’m an owner
owner.body: Register your pet, keep the certificate, and declare lost when needed.

clinic.title: I’m a clinic
clinic.body: Register chips at implant, manage lost pets, and offer the registry fee to clients.

lost_cta.title: Pets declared lost
lost_cta.subtitle: Browse the public wall or search by microchip. No sensitive home details.

lost_wall.title: Lost pets
lost_wall.subtitle: Public reunion wall. Broad area only — no home address or owner phone.
lost_wall.empty_body: When an owner or clinic declares a loss, it will show here. You can also search by microchip.
lost_wall.empty_filtered_body: Try another city or species, or clear the filters.

join.title: Join the network
join.subtitle: Owners who register. Clinics that implant. One animal identity for Peru — ready for Latam.

sponsors.title: Network partners
sponsors.subtitle: Clinics connected with clinical software that registers the microchip on AlmaPet ID.

network.title: Who powers and joins AlmaPet
network.subtitle: Technology partners and VetSaaS clinics with an active plan and published brand mark.

trust.title: Built with care
trust.subtitle: Privacy first. No GPS promises and no cryptocurrency.

privacy.title: Mediated contact
privacy.body: Finders don’t see your phone — we notify you and the clinic.

no_gps.title: The chip is not GPS
no_gps.body: It identifies the animal. AlmaPet ID is the network that makes that number useful.

no_crypto.title: Simple payment
no_crypto.body: Registry fee in local currency. No wallets or blockchain.

footer.tagline: Animal identity network. Microchip, certificate, and reunion.
